title: Clan-Vorsazg
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Clan-Vorsazg''' was an [[Ubese/Legends|Ubese]] clan from the [[Southern Wastes]] of [[Uba IV/Legends|Uba IV]]. Circa [[3 ABY/Legends|3 ABY]], they were led by [[Savax]], who styled himself [[War-Master]] of the Southern Wastes. They were part of the ill-fated alliance that [[Warlord/Legends|warlord]] put together to attack the "''yrak pootzck''" Ubese of [[Ubertica]]. Their forces were utterly defeated by the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] during the [[strike against Ubertica]].

==Appearances==
